summary.headline: Bunge Global SA amended its existing trade receivables securitization program.
summary.narrative_summary: On March 31, 2026, Bunge Global SA and certain of its subsidiaries amended their existing trade receivables securitization program with a financial institution. The amendments increased the aggregate size of the program by $500 million to an aggregate total of $2 billion.

extraction_notes: Numbers and details from the amendment document; cover sheet only had Item references.
